name: Burgundy Burgers
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup burgundy or other red wine
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix all the ingredients together.
2. Shape mixture into 6 patties, each about 3/4-inch thick.
3. Broil or grill the patties 4-inches from the heat.
- Turn once to achieve the desired doneness, about 10 to 15 minutes.
4. Serve on toasted buns with a favorite topping. See toppings.
